# openai_roles (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve a list of all roles configured for the OpenAI organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all roles configured for the organization
data "openai_roles" "all" {
}

# Output all role IDs
output "all_role_ids" {
  value = data.openai_roles.all.role_ids
}

# Output the count of roles
output "role_count" {
  value = data.openai_roles.all.role_count
}

# Output role names
output "role_names" {
  value = [for role in data.openai_roles.all.roles : role.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `role_count` (Number) Number of roles in the organization.
- `role_ids` (List of String) List of role IDs in the organization.
- `roles` (Attributes List) List of roles in the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--roles))

<a id="nestedatt--roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `roles`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) The description of the role.
- `name` (String) The name of the role.
- `permissions` (List of String) Permissions granted by the role.
- `predefined_role` (Boolean) Whether the role is predefined and managed by OpenAI.
- `resource_type` (String) Resource type the role is bound to (e.g., 'api.organization').
- `role_id` (String) The ID of the role.
